data.body:
EPIC_COMPLETION_VERIFIER: NOT_VERIFIED

SC1 PASS: sprint→preplanning→design-wireframe nesting chain eliminated; design-wireframe is redirect stub; preplanning dispatches dso:ui-designer via Agent tool.
SC2 PASS: ui-designer returns CACHE_MISSING instead of invoking ui-discover internally; ui-discover runs at orchestrator level via dispatch-protocol.md Section 3.
SC3 PASS: plugins/dso/agents/ui-designer.md exists (595 lines, Lite+Full tracks, UI_DESIGNER_PAYLOAD); CLAUDE.md agent table updated.
SC4 PASS: CACHE_MISSING retry cap (2 attempts, 3 total) implemented in dispatch-protocol.md Section 3; INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED escalation present.
SC5 FAIL: Design review loop not implemented. dispatch-protocol.md Section 4 explicitly excludes Phase 5, only tagging design:pending_review. Bug ticket: f227-88bb.
SC6 FAIL: Scope-split precedence gate not enforced in dispatch-protocol.md Section 5. SKILL.md line 385 has behavioral note only. Bug ticket: 9678-b9a6.

Additional: implementation-plan/SKILL.md line 709 has stale /dso:design-wireframe reference. Bug ticket: c3f2-b72c.

Epic remains in_progress pending f227-88bb, 9678-b9a6 resolution.
